mapper.sql: id, article_id, user_id, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM blog_article_like WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_article_like WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_article_like (id, article_id, user_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{articleId}, #{userId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_article_like SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_article_like (id, article_id, user_id, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{articleId}, #{userId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deletedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE deleted_at = VALUES(deleted_at), updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1
